g.text: SW1 receives the frame and checks the source MAC against its MAC table.

g.title: Sheet.198
g.desc: If the source MAC is in the table, refresh the aging timer; i...
g.text: If the source MAC is in the table, refresh the aging timer; if not, add a new entry (learn the MAC).
